step_description: NOTE: Only process documents with route_to_step=5 (document_category="Site Plan"). TAL spreadsheet files and Design Brief files must be excluded. Using the processing plan from Step 2, filter the document list to only those where 'document_category' is 'Site Plan'. Do not process any document tagged as 'Design Brief'. For each Site Plan document, run the two-phase extraction defined in proc-extract-site-plan-info. Phase 1 extracts all numbered notes and callout annotations (ATTENTION/WARNING/CAUTION/NOTICE) from every page of the drawing in full. Phase 2 analyses those extracted notes to produce four structured checks: (1) Substation Data — extract the seven Substation Notes fields (Substation Asset Number, Transformer Size, HV Switchgear with 1.5MVA Siemens RLR override rule, Voltage Level, LV Switchgear, Cubicle Size, Earthing); (2) Assets Field Check Compliance — verify note 'HAVE ALL EXISTING ASSETS BEEN FIELD CHECKED AND ARE ACCURATE AT THE TIME OF DRAWING' is present and answered YES; (3) Easement Restriction — check for the swimming pool restriction-on-use-of-land easement note; (4) Easement Substation — check for the padmount substation easement note with dimensions and lot number.

sub-step-extract-all-notes.most_common_value:
9. REIMBURSEMENTS WILL BE PAID TO THE NOMINATED
PARTY ON THE LETTER OF INTENT AFTER THE
WORKS HAVE BEEN COMPLETED AND THE LETTER OF
ACCEPTANCE HAS BEEN ISSUED. THE REIMBURSED
AMOUNT IS SHOWN IN THE FUNDING ARRANGEMENTS
FOR SCOPE OF WORK. ANY DISAGREEMENT WITH THE
AMOUNT SHOULD BE RESOLVED WITH ENDEAVOUR
ENERGY PRIOR TO THE COMMENCEMENT OF WORKS.
10. HAVE ALL THE EXISTING ASSETS BEEN FIELD
CHECKED AND ARE ACCURATE AT THE TIME OF
DESIGN?
11. ENVIRONMENTAL MANAGEMENT PLAN: EMP EMS0001
IS PART OF THE DESIGN.
1 THIS DRAWING IS TO BE READ IN CONJUNCTION WITH
THE RELEVANT ENDEAVOUR ENERGY NETWORK
STANDARDS AND CONNECTION POLICY.
2 ENDEAVOUR ENERGY CONTACT PHONE: 131 081.
3 DESIGN CERTIFICATION SHALL LAPSE WHERE:-
(i) NOTICE OF INTENT HAS NOT BEEN RECEIVED
WITHIN SIX (6) MONTHS OF THIS
CERTIFICATION;
OR
(ii) WORKS COMPLETED CONSTRUCTION HAS
BEEN INTERRUPTED FOR MORE THAN SIX (6)
MONTHS.
WHERE DESIGN CERTIFICATION HAS LAPSED THE
DESIGN MUST BE RESUBMITTED FOR CERTIFICATION
BY THE ACCREDITED DESIGNER.
4 ATTENTION
PERMANENT SURVEY MARKS MAY EXIST IN THIS
AREA. THESE MARKS ARE TO BE LOCATED BY A
SURVEYOR PRIOR TO COMMENCEMENT OF ANY
WORKS.
5 ATTENTION
ALL SERVICES SEARCHES MUST BE CHECKED
BEFORE CONSTRUCTION.
6 WARNING
LIVE ENDEAVOUR ENERGY CABLES AND OTHER
SERVICES IN THIS AREA. PLEAS CONTACT DIAL
BEFORE YOU DIG ON TELEPHONE: 1100 FOR SEARCH
TWO (2) DAYS PRIOR TO EXCAVATION.
7 ATTENTION
SERVICE PROVIDER TO NOTIFY ENDEAVOUR
ENERGY'S ASSET DATA CUSTOMER DEPARTMENT
DAILY WHEN CABLE WORKS IS IN PROGRESS.
TELEPHONE: 131 081.
8 OPERATIONAL LIMITS
UNLESS APPROVED OTHERWISE, INTERRUPTION TO
ANY CUSTOMER'S SUPPLY MUST BE AVOIDED. THE
FOLLOWING ALTERNATIVES SHOULD BE
CONSIDERED:
9 REIMBURSEMENTS WILL BE PAID TO THE NOMINATED
PARTY ON THE LETTER OF INTENT AFTER THE
WORKS HAVE BEEN COMPLETED AND THE LETTER OF
ACCEPTANCE HAS BEEN ISSUED. THE REIMBURSED
AMOUNT IS SHOWN IN THE FUNDING ARRANGEMENTS
FOR SCOPE OF WORK. ANY DISAGREEMENT WITH THE
AMOUNT SHOULD BE RESOLVED WITH ENDEAVOUR
ENERGY PRIOR TO THE COMMENCEMENT OF WORKS.
10 HAVE ALL THE EXISTING ASSETS BEEN FIELD
CHECKED AND ARE ACCURATE AT THE TIME OF
DESIGN?
11 SDI:
Substation Design Instruction
SAD 0001:
Design Drawing Standard
12 MMI:
Mains Maintenance Instruction
13 SMI:
Substation Maintenance Instruction
LDI 0001: Public lighting Electrical Design Element
Additionally, where relevant, the design complies with AS
Design - Detailed Procedures" published by The Australia
14 CONSIDERED:
